name_cn:
【Dynamic Chip 1st Tier Original】
Top-grain Leather M46757 This Dauphine East West Handbag combines classic Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas to create a slender silhouette, cleverly echoing the rectangular outline of the Dauphine LV lock. Cleverly uses a detachable leather shoulder strap and chain for versatile carrying.
21 x 12 x 5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
